function.message: Processed the next inbox item by OCR-structuring all bills related to Badger. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to 4 purchase bill records and preserved each original note body verbatim below frontmatter. Then deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system and applicable workflows/schemas before task work, read nested AGENTS in entered folders, treated inbox as request and cross-checked canonical entity identity via 10_entities/cast/badger.md, preserved existing bodies exactly during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request explicitly asked to 'OCR all bills related to Badger'. Search in /50_finance found 4 Badger-related purchase bills. Each target file contained visible bill fields and line items sufficient for all required bill schema fields in finance-record-frontmatter.md. Updated each of the 4 files with required bill frontmatter (`record_type`, `bill_id`, `alias`, `purchased_on`, `total_eur`, `counterparty`, `project`, `lines`) and optional `related_entity`, matching visible values and arithmetic, while preserving original body text. Then removed the processed inbox file per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update workflows.
